headline: GENERAC ACQUIRES BELVIDERE, ILLINOIS FACILITY TO EXPAND LARGE-MEGAWATT GENERATOR PACKAGING CAPACITY
summary: Generac Holdings Inc. (NYSE: GNRC), a leading global designer, manufacturer and provider of energy technology solutions and other power products, announced the acquisition of a new facility in Belvidere, Illinois. The investment will significantly expand the company's packaging capacity for large-megawatt (MW) generators as demand continues to accelerate across key sectors.

content.title: GENERAC ACQUIRES BELVIDERE, ILLINOIS FACILITY TO EXPAND LARGE-MEGAWATT GENERATOR PACKAGING CAPACITY

headline: Will Generac's (GNRC) New Belvidere Megawatt Packaging Hub Redefine Its Data Center Power Narrative?
summary: Generac Holdings recently acquired a new facility in Belvidere, Illinois, to expand packaging capacity for large-megawatt generators and support enclosure assembly and final shipment-ready units, building on its earlier Enercon Engineering acquisition and broader Commercial & Industrial expansion efforts. The Belvidere site’s access to major interstate routes, combined with Generac’s data center-focused investments and partnerships, highlights how the company is reshaping its manufacturing...
